title: alchemilla coriacea var. trunciloba
intro: Alchemilla coriacea var. trunciloba is a variety of the Alpine Lady's Mantle plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds and reduce swelling. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Alchemilla coriacea var. trunciloba can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for a range of herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
